roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT ADD TO CAL FOR CPO MODIFICATION. DEFENSE ATTORNEY HAS BEEN NOTIFIED OF THE REQUESTED DATE/TIME.
Defendant Change of Plea to "Guilty" or "No Contest" - Acknowledgement and Advisement of Defendant Pleading Guilty or No Contest

/CAL:DECISION ON ACM ELIG AND TO SET PRELIM/LD:11-16-21/X:THE PEOPLE APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, /CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND COUNSELING, GROUP (HEALTHRIGHT 360) AS DIRECTED; ABIDE BY ANY STAY AWAYORDER OR OTHER RESTRICTION NOT ON THIS FORM; NO CONTYACT WITH STEPHANIE CHAVEZ/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOPU:POSITIVEREPORT/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:EXHIBIT LIST IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN FILED IN OPEN COURT,/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: GEORGE BORGES/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:11-16-21/X:MOTION TO DETAIN IS GRANTED,/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESSRESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/SAORD/SA2:STEPHANIE CHAVEZ/SAORD2/SAORD3/X:MATTERIS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT AND TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:ACM ELIG REPORT AND TO SET PRELIM/DAWT/LD:11-16-21/X:THE PEOPLE APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/CONTD:DECISION ON ACM ELIG & TO SET PRELIM/DOPC/
